Footer.legalNotice: PeptiBrain is a personal tracking diary. It is not medical advice and does not replace a healthcare professional, and it does not recommend doses: it records what you decide. Always consult a professional before making decisions about your health.

Hero.subtitle: Log your doses, weight, hydration and effects in one place. See your trends, keep your streak, and never lose track of your protocol.
Hero.bullet1: Your data is yours, encrypted and private
Hero.bullet2: Works in your browser and installs on your phone
Hero.bullet3: Not medical advice: you decide, we log it

Benefits.title: Your whole protocol, in one place
Benefits.subtitle: What used to live in five apps and a notebook, with the same gesture.
Benefits.item1Body: Note what you took, when, and where. The app keeps track for you.
Benefits.item2Title: Knows how much you have left
Benefits.item2Body: Calculates each vial’s reconstitution and warns you before you run out.
Benefits.item3Body: A calendar and streaks that celebrate your consistency, day after day.
Benefits.item4Body: Weight, meals, hydration, exercise and side effects, all in one place.
Benefits.item5Body: Notifications for your next dose, right when you need them.

HowItWorks.title: Get started in under a minute
HowItWorks.step1Body: Set it up once with its route and dose unit. It’s the foundation for everything.
HowItWorks.step2Body: The app works out your stock and builds your calendar automatically.
HowItWorks.step3Body: Clear trends, streaks, and reminders that keep you on track.

Pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade when you need to.
Pricing.subtitle: Start for free; your plan is managed inside the app.
Pricing.footnote: Signing up starts a 7-day free trial of Premium. No card required.
Pricing.premiumFeature4: Full health tracking (meals, water, exercise, effects)

Testimonials.title: The people using it don’t stop
Testimonials.reservedBody: Reserved for a real user. It gets filled in as soon as someone tries it and wants to share.

viviana.quote: I went from a thousand scattered notes on my phone to having it all in PeptiBrain in under 10 seconds. A total shift for my productivity.

marco.quote: Stop eyeballing how much is left in each vial. With PeptiBrain you know the exact remainder instantly and avoid unpleasant surprises.

isa.quote: Keeping my streak has become my daily challenge. I’ve tried a thousand wellness apps, but PeptiBrain is the first one I haven’t dropped within a week.

Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.a1: Your personal peptide diary: log doses, vials, and wellness in one place.
Faq.a2: No. It only logs what you decide. We don’t give medical advice or suggest doses.
Faq.q3: What devices does it work on?
Faq.a3: Any browser, and it installs on your phone like an app.
Faq.a4: Yes, it’s encrypted in transit and it’s only yours. You can export it or delete your account anytime.
Faq.a5: Free to start. Premium {premium}/mo and Family {family}/mo, with a 7-day free trial.

FinalCta.title: Every entry counts. Every day adds up.
FinalCta.subtitle: Start tracking today. Free, in your browser or on your phone.

Login.tagline: Every entry counts. Every day adds up.
Login.passwordPlaceholder: At least 8 characters and a number
Login.acceptPrefix: I’m over 18 and I accept the
Login.understandPrefix: I understand PeptiBrain is a personal tracking diary and
Login.errorFixFields: Check your name, email, and that your password has 8 characters and a number.
Login.errorAcceptTerms: You need to accept the terms to continue.
Login.errorEmailTaken: That email already has an account. Try signing in instead.
Login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

Onboarding.step1Title: Which one do we start with?
Onboarding.step1Hint: Pick a suggestion or type your own
Onboarding.step2Question: How much peptide does the vial contain?
Onboarding.bacWaterPlaceholder: e.g. 2 — leave empty if you haven’t reconstituted it yet
Onboarding.whenPlaceholder: Or type a date and time

Paywall.madeWithAnswers: Made with your answers from a moment ago. Choose how you want to continue.
Paywall.value1: Your streak and calendar, always visible
Paywall.value3: Share with your partner or family (Family)
Paywall.simulatedNote: You will be redirected to Hotmart to complete your payment securely.

Peptidos.title: Peptides
Peptidos.subtitle: Your peptides, vials, and calculator
Peptidos.emptyState: You haven’t added any peptide yet.
Peptidos.noVialsYet: You haven’t logged any vial yet.
Peptidos.overCapacity: This exceeds the syringe’s capacity — use a larger one.

Salud.title: Health
Salud.subtitle: How your body is responding to the protocol
Salud.emptyState: You haven’t logged weight, hydration, or exercise yet.

Familia.title: Family
Familia.subtitle: Share your progress with whoever you choose
Familia.inviteNote: We’ll send them an invite. You decide what they see, and you can change it anytime.
Familia.emptyState: You haven’t invited anyone yet. Your progress stays yours until you decide to share it.
Familia.confirmRemove: Remove {name}? They will no longer be able to see your progress.
